hook.prompt: Based on the current task context, estimate how many files this change is likely to touch. If the file being written is a markdown (.md) file (e.g. design docs, plans, progress notes), allow silently — documentation files are planning artifacts, not implementation. Otherwise, if the change implies modifications to more than 5 files (high blast radius), warn: '[GUARD] High blast radius — consider running /brainstorm first to plan the approach.' If the scope is contained, allow silently.
